hero.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience building scalable web applications using Laravel, React.js, and modern JavaScript technologies. Passionate about developing secure APIs, responsive user interfaces, and real-time applications using Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, and Next.js.

about.heading: Building scalable applications with modern web technologies.

cards.title: Professional Narrative
cards.description: I specialize in developing full-stack web applications that combine robust backend systems with intuitive user experiences. My experience spans Laravel, React.js, RESTful APIs, authentication systems, database optimization, and modern JavaScript development. I actively build projects using Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, and real-time communication technologies while maintaining a strong focus on clean architecture and performance.

cards.title: Work History
cards.subtitle: Software Engineer — Netwin Infosolutions
cards.description: Contributed to scalable backend development using Laravel while building reusable React.js interfaces, RESTful APIs, JWT authentication systems, and third-party integrations. Worked across frontend and backend layers with a focus on performance, maintainability, and secure application development.

items.title: Audience Engagement & Analytics Platform
items.description: Developing a full-stack platform that enables organizers to create QR-based polls, surveys, and feedback forms for audience interaction. Building RESTful APIs, real-time response collection, and analytics dashboards using Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, Next.js, and WebSockets.

items.title: Workflow Management Platform
items.description: Built a productivity dashboard integrating GitHub, Gmail, and Google Calendar APIs with secure OAuth authentication. Implemented real-time updates using Server-Sent Events (SSE), intelligent caching strategies, and modular productivity tracking systems.

items.title: ATS Resume Checker
items.description: A high-performance parsing engine built to optimize resumes for Applicant Tracking Systems, featuring asynchronous bulk-scanning and real-time score calculation.

items.title: JSON to TypeScript Transformer
items.description: A high-performance conversion engine that transforms JSON into TypeScript Interfaces, Type Aliases, or Zod schemas. Features advanced AST-based inference and a terminal-inspired developer interface.

items.title: Global Pulse: Intelligence Engine
items.description: A config-driven synchronization platform that distills complex API metadata into a unified command center. Features a generic Strategy Pattern for multi-source data ingestion and a dynamic Bento-grid UI.
